---
title: "Citation"
---

## SimiC-Suite

Please cite the SimiC-Suite application note when using the combined software suite.

```bibtex
@article{simic_suite_placeholder,
  title   = {SimiC-Suite: A reproducible framework for phenotype-specific gene regulatory network analysis from single-cell RNA-seq data},
  author  = {Author names to be added},
  journal = {Journal to be added},
  year    = {Year to be added},
  doi     = {DOI to be added}
}
```

## Original SimiC Citation

Please also cite the original SimiC work when using SimiCPipeline where appropriate.

Peng, J., Serrano, G., Traniello, I.M. et al. SimiC enables the inference of complex gene regulatory dynamics across cell phenotypes. *Communications Biology* 5, 351 (2022). <https://doi.org/10.1038/s42003-022-03319-7>

```bibtex
@article{peng2022simic,
  title   = {SimiC enables the inference of complex gene regulatory dynamics across cell phenotypes},
  author  = {Peng, Jianlong and Serrano, Ginny and Traniello, Irene M. and others},
  journal = {Communications Biology},
  volume  = {5},
  number  = {1},
  pages   = {351},
  year    = {2022},
  doi     = {10.1038/s42003-022-03319-7}
}
```
